about.name: Zono
about.title: Software Engineer
about.introText: Hello! I'm Zono, a software engineer focused on web development. I specialize in frontend development using TypeScript and React. In this blog, I share technical insights and daily learnings.
about.careerItem1Description: Engaged in web application development. Responsible for both frontend and backend development.
about.careerItem2Description: Responsible for website development and system development.

home.title: To get started, edit the page.tsx file.

blog.title: Blog
blog.noPostsDescription: No posts have been published yet. Check back later.

aiDevelopment.title: About AI-Driven Development
aiDevelopment.subtitle: This site is built using AI-driven development as part of learning AI technologies.
aiDevelopment.whatIsText: AI-driven development is an approach where developers design and implement software through conversation with an AI assistant. The developer gives instructions to the AI, and they collaboratively generate, review, and refactor code. On this site, every phase from design to coding and debugging is carried out in collaboration with AI.
aiDevelopment.whyText: The evolution of AI technology is transforming how software is developed. To learn about this shift through hands-on experience, I'm exploring the workflows, possibilities, and challenges of AI-driven development through real product development.

how.step1: The developer describes the desired feature or requirements to the AI in natural language
how.step2: The AI generates code, and the developer reviews and provides feedback
how.step3: Through iterative dialogue, the feature is refined and completed

aiDevelopment.disclaimer: The code for this site was generated in collaboration with an AI assistant. This is a project aimed at AI learning and experimentation.

metadata.aiDevelopmentDescription: About AI-driven development of this site

banner.vibeCoding: This site was created with Vibe Coding for learning purposes.
